title: Kalshi Raises Over $1B at $22B Valuation Despite Regulatory Pressure
message_html: Kalshi Raises Over $1B at $22B Valuation Despite Regulatory Pressure ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Kalshi Raises Over $1B at $22B Valuation Despite Regulatory Pressure According to Bloomberg, Kalshi has raised more than $1 billion in a new funding round at a $22 billion valuation, roughly doubling from about $11 billion in December 2025; the round was led by Coatue

title: Forward Industries buys back shares using crypto-backed debt
message_html: Forward Industries buys back shares using crypto-backed debt ...
snippet: The company is leveraging its crypto treasury to fund a share buyback, reducing outstanding shares and potentially boosting per-share value following a six-month slide.
